title: HazardousMaterialsLabels

additionalInformation.description: Additional information about the hazardous materials labels.

pictograms.description: An array of hazard pictograms that apply to the item.

signalWord.description: The signal word for the hazardous materials label (such as Danger or Warning).

signalWordId.description: The ID of the signal word for the hazardous materials label.

statements.description: An array of hazard statements for the item.

description: A type that defines the hazardous materials labels for an item.
